# TruBill Invoice

> TruBill (https://trubill.in) is a cloud-based GST billing and inventory
> SaaS built for retail traders, restaurants, juice shops, footwear stores,
> and textile merchants in Tamil Nadu, India.

## What is TruBill?

TruBill is the fastest GST billing software for Tamil Nadu small businesses.
It allows cashiers to generate GST-compliant invoices, manage product
inventory, track variants (size, colour, fabric), and share invoices via
WhatsApp — all from a single web application.

## Who is TruBill built for?

- Restaurant owners and cloud kitchen operators in Tamil Nadu
- Juice shops and beverage counter businesses
- Footwear and chappals retailers (especially in Coimbatore, Tiruppur, Chennai)
- Textile and saree shop merchants
- General retail traders filing GSTR-1

## Core Features

- GST invoice generation with 5%, 12%, and 18% dynamic tax slabs
- GSTR-1 return filing export (B2B, B2CS, CDNR, CDNUR formats)
- Multi-user roles: Admin, Manager, Cashier with permission gates
- Minimum Selling Price (MSP) guardrails — blocks cashiers from billing
  below wholesale cost without manager passcode
- Barcode scanner integration for fast counter billing
- WhatsApp invoice dispatch via Meta Cloud API (zero third-party markup)
- Product variant management: size, colour, fabric type
- GSTIN validation and HSN/SAC auto-suggestion
- Supabase-powered real-time activity feed for live business monitoring
- 7-day free trial with limited WhatsApp invoices, no credit card required

## Pricing

TruBill offers a 7-day free trial with limited WhatsApp invoices. The Standard plan is ₹349/month (or ₹4,188/year) with almost all features available.

## Contact & Support

- Website: https://trubill.in
- Email: trubillapp@gmail.com
- Support language: English and Tamil
- Jurisdiction: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

## Legal

- Privacy Policy: https://trubill.in/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://trubill.in/terms
- GST Filing Disclaimer: TruBill is a billing tool and does not provide
  chartered accountant services. Users are responsible for verifying their
  own GST return accuracy before submission.
